reviews.comment:
Limpieza de baños escasa, se abre tarde y la atención podría mejorar! La verdad que una pena...ni medialunas para los chicos tenían... los servicios deben estar a disposición de los clientes.... todo el horario que sea posible

(Translated by Google)
Bathroom cleaning was poor, it opens late, and the service could be better! It's a real shame... they didn't even have croissants for the kids... the restrooms should be available to customers... for as many hours as possible.

reviews.comment:
En ALGÚN MOMENTO TUVO MUY BUEN SERVICIO. LAS ÚLTIMAS VECES, ESTÁN MUY LENTOS, ANTES TE LIMPIABA LOS VIDRIOS. AHORA SU SERVICIO HA BAJADO MUCHO
ES UNA PENA, PORQUE ESTÁ MUY BIEN UBICADO Y CÓMODO PARA CARGAR NAFFTA, ES UN LINDO LUGAR
Y MUY ESPACIOSO
ESPEREMOS QUE LO LEAN Y VUEVA A TENER ESE TAN BUEN SERVICIO. SALUDOS CORDIALES

(Translated by Google)
At one point, they had very good service. The last few times, they've been very slow. They used to clean your windows. Now, their service has dropped a lot.
It's a shame, because it's very well located and convenient for filling up with gas. It's a nice place and very spacious.
We hope they read this and that they have such good service again. Best regards.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tSWk1UWlNaSHB0WkhWZlUxSkVObW8yTjFCTVZYYxAB
